name: BLACKROCK FUND ADVISORS
description: A San Francisco company at 400 Howard Street with 126 employees, operating as a subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc.

esg_policy.value: BlackRock Fund Advisors integrates ESG considerations into its investment strategies, including managing funds focused on ESG criteria such as the BlackRock LifePath ESG Index 2070 Fund, adjusting fund names to comply with ESMA guidelines, and supporting the transition to a low-carbon economy through investments in green bonds and renewable energy infrastructure.
